Matched
0 C 0n
1 C 1n

3 C 3n
4 AND 02
5 AND 13
6 AND 24
7 AND 35

Applying to 00000111
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 C 0n = NOT(1) = 0
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 AND 02 = AND(I 0,I 2) = AND(0,0) = 0
5 AND 13 = AND(I 1,I 3) = AND(0,0) = 0
6 AND 24 = AND(I 2,I 4) = AND(0,0) = 0
7 AND 35 = AND(I 3,I 5) = AND(0,1) = 0

\boxed{00000000}
